rows.description: Receipts by Messrs. Biddulph Cocks & Co. Bankers, London.
rows.notes: Visual verification led to combining elements from both extractors. 'Messrs.' (with superscript 'rs') is clear, aligning with gpt-5-mini's interpretation of the initial abbreviation. 'Biddulph Cocks & Co.' matches gemini-flash for 'Cocks'. The rest of the description is consistent across both models.
rows.section_header: Receipts by Messrs. Biddulph Cocks & Co. Bankers, London.

rows.notes: Full consensus across both extractors. The year '1798' is clearly visible and functions as a header for the following entries.

rows.description: Jan. - ½ years Div. on 5108.17.5 Consols 3 p. Cent.
rows.notes: Monetary values (£76 12s 7d) were in consensus. Visual verification of the description favored gemini-flash, specifically 'Jan. - ½ years Div.' and 'Consols 3 p. Cent.'. The pence digit '7' is slightly ambiguous in the image but gpt-5-mini's note provided strong reasoning for choosing '7' based on vertical alignment and reconciliation with the final page total, which aligns with supervisor's visual check and validation.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year dividend received on 3% Consols (holding £5,108 17s 5d), amounting to £76 12s 7d.

rows.description: April - D° on 546.0.9 - Dr. Bray's 4 p. Cent.
rows.notes: Monetary values (£10 18s 4d) were in consensus and are very clear in the image. Visual verification for the description clearly favors gemini-flash, correcting gpt-5-mini's '5460.0.9' to '546.0.9' and 'Dr Bayl' to 'Dr. Bray's'. The 'D°' (ditto mark) and 'p. Cent.' are also more accurately captured by gemini-flash.
rows.english_description: Dividend received on Dr. Bray's 4% stock (holding £546 0s 9d).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend received on Dr. Bray's 4% stock (holding £546 0s 9d), amounting to £10 18s 4d.

rows.description: July - D° 3 p. Cents. as before
rows.notes: Monetary values (£76 12s 7d) were in consensus. Visual verification of the description slightly favored gemini-flash for 'D°' and 'p. Cents.'. Similar to the January entry, the pence digit '7' is ambiguous, but gpt-5-mini's note about consistency with stroke shape and reconciliation to the page total is a strong justification for its selection.
rows.english_description: Half-year dividend received on 3% Consols (holding £5,108 17s 5d), as before.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year dividend received on 3% Consols (holding £5,108 17s 5d), amounting to £76 12s 7d.

rows.description: Oct - D° 4 p. Cents. as before
rows.notes: Monetary values (£10 18s 4d) were in consensus and are very clear in the image. Visual verification for the description clearly favors gemini-flash, specifically for 'D°' and 'p. Cents.'.
rows.english_description: Half-year dividend received on Dr. Bray's 4% stock (holding £546 0s 9d), as before.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year dividend received on Dr. Bray's 4% stock (holding £546 0s 9d), amounting to £10 18s 4d.

rows.description: Exchequer Annuity, a Year to July 5 -
rows.notes: Full consensus on monetary values and row type. Amounts (£50 0s 0d) are exceptionally clear in the image. gemini-flash's description includes the subtle trailing dash which is visible in the ledger.
rows.english_description: Annual Exchequer annuity due to July 5.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual Exchequer annuity due to July 5, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Full consensus across both extractors for the total amount. The values (£225 1s 10d) are extremely clear in the image. gemini-flash's note providing a mathematical validation of the sum against the preceding entries (including the ambiguous pence values) further strengthens confidence in this total and the earlier pence selections.
